research_question: Can an EXIT REDESIGN (sweep strike_offset x tp1_premium_pct x chart-stop-buffer) flip the strong-SPY-edge WATCH_ONLY watchers to real-fills-POSITIVE while staying anchor-clean? Real-fills (OPRA) is the only authority (C1).
gate_definition: PROMOTE-CANDIDATE iff real-fills exp>0 AND anchor_edge_capture >= baseline AND DSR/PBO advisory verdict != FAIL. Baseline = current production exit (ATM, tp1=0.30, stop_buffer=0.50). Honest no-win is a valid result.

FLOOR_HOLD_BOUNCE.pattern_verdict: DEAD-UNDER-TESTED-EXITS — best exit ({'strike_offset': -1, 'tp1_premium_pct': 1.0, 'level_stop_buffer_dollars': 0.3}) reaches positive real-fills exp=$0.54 but fails the anchor regression leg of the gate. No PROMOTE-CANDIDATE config.

CLOSE_CEILING_FADE.pattern_verdict: DEAD-UNDER-ALL-TESTED-EXITS — NO exit config in the swept grid produced positive real-fills expectancy. Confirmed real-fills-unprofitable across strike_offset x tp1 x stop-buffer. Honest no-win.

NAMED_LEVEL_SECOND_TEST.pattern_verdict: DEAD-UNDER-ALL-TESTED-EXITS — NO exit config in the swept grid produced positive real-fills expectancy. Confirmed real-fills-unprofitable across strike_offset x tp1 x stop-buffer. Honest no-win.

op20_disclosures.authority: Real-fills (lib.simulator_real + OPRA options cache, valid through 2026-05-29). BS-sim is ranking-only and is NOT used here (C1). SPY-price grade omitted — the prior level-family-validation.json already established SPY-space edge; this run tests ONLY whether real-fills can be flipped by exit geometry.
op20_disclosures.level_source_caveat: All 3 watchers read key-levels.json from disk; this run monkeypatches each per-day cache to SYNTHETIC PDH/PDL/PDC/PDO proxies (★★/★), NOT production ★★★ named levels (no historical archive). Absolute WR is a proxy LOWER-BOUND (PDL-class proxies understate ★★★ WR up to ~20pp per L58). The EXIT comparison is internally consistent (identical level set across all configs), so 'does any exit flip the sign?' is answerable on the proxy.
op20_disclosures.concentration: Per-config n is the real-fills fill count (OPRA-available, capped at 400/stream). Small per-config n → DSR capped at WEAK on low_power (n<20). Treat single-config wins with the per-quarter concentration caveat from the parent level-family-validation.json.
op20_disclosures.anchor_gate: OP-16 shape on real-fills: anchor_edge_capture = sum(pnl on WIN-anchor days) - sum(max(0,-pnl) on LOSS-anchor days). 'no regression' = config's edge_capture >= the current-production-exit baseline's. NOTE: anchor n is tiny (J has 3 WIN + 3 LOSS days, and these watchers fire on only a subset) — a clean anchor here is necessary, not sufficient (lesson C24: absence of regression at small-n is weak evidence).
op20_disclosures.premium_stop: premium_stop_pct=-0.99 (disabled) for ALL configs — chart/ribbon/time exits only (C1/C2). This sweep isolates chart-exit geometry; it does NOT re-test premium stops.
op20_disclosures.dsr_returns: DSR/PSR computed on per-trade dollar P&L (constant qty=3 notional → comparable). PBO skipped (no CSCV per-slice matrix). Advisory only (gate.py is not a hard gate).
op20_disclosures.not_a_promotion: RESEARCH ONLY. No watcher code, params, or doctrine changed. Watchers remain WATCH_ONLY. A PROMOTE-CANDIDATE here means 'worth a real-fills re-test on production ★★★ levels', not 'wire it live'.

overall_verdict.summary: 0/3 patterns have >=1 clean PROMOTE-CANDIDATE exit config. Confirmed dead under all tested exits: FLOOR_HOLD_BOUNCE, CLOSE_CEILING_FADE, NAMED_LEVEL_SECOND_TEST.
